song.title: Joyful, Joyful We Adore You
song.author: Linda Lee Johnson and Ludwig van Beethove
song.lyrics:
[v1] . G C Joyful, joyful, we adore You . G D God of glory, Lord of light . G C Angels lifting praise before You . G D G Sing throughout this holy night . D G D G In a manger lies a baby . D B Em A D Child of Mary, Son of God . G C Voices joined in joyful chorus . G D G Praise You for Your gift of love
[v2] . G C All Your works declare Your glory . G D All creation joins to sing . G C Praise resounds as earth rejoices . G D G In the birth of Christ the King . D G D G Shepherds kneel before the infant . D B Em A D Trumpets sound and anthems raise . G C As with joy our hearts are lifted . G D G Joined in wonder, love and praise
